home.description: Show the world you have the best music taste! Use semaninha to generate collages of your most listened albums on Last.fm

errors.insufficientData: You don't have enough data to generate the image :(, try a smaller size

errorBoundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page or contact us if the problem persists.

canvas.altText: Collage of {{size}}x{{size}} most listened albums by {{user}} in the {{period}} period

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Semaninha
privacy.intro: Your data is collected only for collage generation and is not stored on any server. The site uses the Last.FM API to fetch user data and most listened albums.
privacy.dataDisplay: Whether album/artist name and play count should be displayed
privacy.noSharing: Collected data is not shared with third parties.
privacy.contact: For more information, contact us at:
